spec_match.rationale: The page now tries the known live SPC availability entry points before falling back to scenario-driven branches.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive controls drive the page (5 buttons, 0 inputs, 1 selects, 0 ranges, 2 listeners) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede now matches the feature-card promise: a cascading SPC to PaymentRequest to form decision chain driven by the availability probe.

edge_cases.rationale: Page surfaces multiple failure / unsupported / edge-case branches in the UI, not just the happy path.

references.rationale: The see-also section now cites chromestatus.com/feature/5165040614768640 and the SPC availability spec pull request.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: The payment method chain now clears its major and moderate findings: it includes the required ChromeStatus link, probes live SPC availability methods where present, exposes fallback/error/merchant-policy branches, and keeps the checkout cascade interactive.
